summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of ReLaunch AI. 11/11 backend pytest cases pass (root, resume upload/enhance, skills, interview questions/feedback, story, chat+history, progress). Frontend: landing loads, all 7 routes accessible, Skills/Chat/Story happy-path flows fully wired to backend APIs and return real AI content.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 'Budget has been exceeded! Max budget: 0.001' from litellm on first hit in a burst. Passed on retry. Likely per-call budget cap on the Emergent LLM proxy when large prompts + big completions are requested. Not code bug but worth monitoring.

integration_issues.issue: During playwright run, user-message testid count was 0 while assistant reply rendered. AI reply is shown correctly; likely an AnimatePresence timing quirk in the test. Recommend main agent manually verify user bubble remains rendered after a reply arrives.

action_items: Consider adding a small retry/backoff wrapper around LLM calls for resume/enhance (larger prompt) to smooth over the intermittent 'budget exceeded' 500s.
(Optional) Re-fetch /api/chat/history after send(), or at least verify user bubble persists visually after assistant arrives — noted as a possible animation quirk.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan context. Non-blocking.

/api/chat persists messages but emergentintegrations already manages session history internally; persistence+LLM session both keyed on same session_id — OK, but history list will grow unbounded. Consider TTL or cap.
extract_json is robust (handles ```json fences and first/last brace fallback) — good.
Resume enhance prompt is the largest; combined with JSON completion it trips the 0.001 USD per-call budget occasionally. Consider trimming system prompt or lowering max completion length.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (nav, skills, chat, story)

seed_data_creation: None — tests use TEST-prefixed session ids that are cheap to leave in the chat_messages/progress collections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All 7 AI endpoints live and return structured JSON. pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_relaunch_api.py — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. AI calls take 5-30s each; timeouts set to 90s. The only transient failure seen was '/api/resume/enhance' returning 500 with a litellm budget-exceeded message; passes on rerun. Frontend tested on happy paths for Skills, Chat, Story via the public preview URL. Interview page not automated end-to-end but route loads; main agent can click through if needed.
rca of the issue: Intermittent /api/resume/enhance 500: Emergent LLM proxy returned 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0030065, Max budget: 0.001'. Likely a per-request/per-minute cap on the key's budget tier that the large enhance prompt occasionally trips. Mitigation: retry once, or shorten the system+prompt and cap max_tokens on completion. Reproduction: hit /api/resume/enhance immediately after several prior AI calls — first call may 500. Rerun succeeds.
